query:
SELECT 
  YEAR(createdAt) as ano,
  MONTH(createdAt) as mes,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  direcao
FROM arquivos
WHERE status = 'processado'
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt), MONTH(createdAt), direcao
ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC;
